You are working on a Flutter app. Your task is to **refine and upgrade the UI/UX ONLY for the Venue Owner / Staff screens** to make them look **professional, polished, and production-ready**, while maintaining a **minimal black-and-white design system**.

---

CRITICAL CONSTRAINTS (NON-NEGOTIABLE):

* ONLY modify Venue Owner / Staff related screens and widgets
* DO NOT edit OrganizerDashboard, AttendeeDashboard, or any unrelated screens
* DO NOT modify global theme or shared styling files
* DO NOT break any existing functionality
* DO NOT change navigation structure outside Venue Owner module
* Keep the design strictly **black, white, and grayscale**
* DO NOT introduce bright or random colors
* Do NOT use emojis anywhere
* Avoid generic or “AI-style” text (no filler content)

---

GOAL

Transform the Venue Owner interface from basic/bland into a **clean, premium, minimal dashboard** that aligns with all previously implemented features (analytics, bookings, map, payments, operations, etc.).

---

# 1. LOCAL THEME REFINEMENT (SCOPED)

Since global theme cannot be changed:

* Apply **localized styling improvements** within Venue Owner widgets
* Use:

  * slightly refined grayscale tones
  * improved contrast between surfaces
* Maintain:

  * existing border radius (12)
  * typography family

---

# 2. TYPOGRAPHY IMPROVEMENTS

* Strengthen hierarchy:

  * Section titles → larger, bold (600–700)
  * Subtitles → medium weight
  * Body → regular weight
* Add consistent vertical spacing between text elements
* Ensure readability across all cards and sections

---

# 3. COMPONENT REFINEMENT

## Buttons

* Improve padding and sizing
* Keep dark primary buttons
* Add subtle press states (opacity or slight elevation)

## Input Fields

* Softer borders (light gray)
* Clear focus state (darker border)
* Consistent internal padding

## Cards

* Use:

  * white background
  * subtle border instead of heavy shadow
* Maintain consistent padding (12–16)
* Ensure uniform spacing between cards

---

# 4. SPACING SYSTEM

Standardize spacing across Venue Owner screens:

* 8 → tight spacing
* 12–16 → normal spacing
* 20+ → section spacing

Avoid:

* cramped layouts
* inconsistent padding

---

# 5. VISUAL HIERARCHY

Improve clarity by:

* Grouping related elements into sections
* Using spacing instead of excessive borders
* Making key actions visually distinct
* Reducing unnecessary UI noise

---

# 6. HEADER IMPROVEMENT

Refine the Venue Owner header:

* Align title properly
* Improve spacing between icons
* Add subtle bottom divider or elevation
* Ensure consistent height and structure

---

# 7. DASHBOARD REFINEMENT

For the Venue Owner dashboard:

## Stats Cards

* Uniform size and layout
* Clear label + value hierarchy
* Better spacing inside cards

## Charts

* Clean layout with proper margins
* Use grayscale tones only
* Avoid visual clutter

## Sections

* Clear separation between:

  * analytics
  * bookings
  * resources
  * etc.

---

# 8. LISTS & DATA DISPLAY

* Improve readability:

  * consistent row height
  * spacing between items
* Use minimal dividers
* Highlight interactive elements subtly

---

# 9. IMAGE HANDLING

* Ensure consistent:

  * aspect ratio
  * rounded corners
* Add spacing around images
* Avoid cluttered galleries

---

# 10. MICRO-INTERACTIONS

Add subtle UI feedback:

* Button press states
* Tap highlights
* Smooth transitions between states

Keep interactions minimal and fast

---

# 11. REMOVE “BLANDNESS” (WITHOUT ADDING COLOR)

To improve visual quality:

* Use contrast (light vs dark surfaces)
* Improve spacing and layout
* Introduce section structure
* Add subtle depth using borders and layering

---

# 12. CONSISTENCY PASS

Ensure across ALL Venue Owner screens:

* Same button styles
* Same input styles
* Same card design
* Same spacing rules
* Same typography hierarchy

---

# 13. DO NOT

* Do NOT modify other dashboards
* Do NOT change global theme
* Do NOT introduce new design systems
* Do NOT add bright colors or gradients
* Do NOT over-design or add unnecessary animations

---

# EXPECTED RESULT

A **refined Venue Owner interface** that:

* Feels professional and production-ready
* Maintains a strong black-and-white aesthetic
* Has clear visual hierarchy
* Uses spacing and contrast effectively
* Is consistent across all Venue Owner screens
* Integrates smoothly with existing features

---

Focus on refinement, consistency, and clarity — not adding complexity.
